## Checklist

- [ ] Tests and linters pass locally (`go test ./...`, `go vet ./...`, `golangci-lint run`, `gofmt -l .`)
- [ ] Code and comments are in English; clean and self-documenting
- [ ] No GPL/AGPL dependencies added; any new dependency's license is stated below
- [ ] I tested only against networks I own or am authorized to manage
